rule_name: 良性或未达FNA标准结节的超声稳定后延长监测间隔

variables.Y1: 首次随访超声检查事件

source_text: For well‑defined, autonomous nodules FNA is rarely indicated and repeat ultrasound may not be necessary. For other nodules not meeting criteria for FNA, or nodules that appear to be benign by ultrasound or FNA, surveillance should include repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months; if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals. If growth and/or change in ultrasonographic features, consider FNA and follow THYR‑3, THYR‑4, and THYR-5 for subsequent management.

rule_name: 监测中结节生长后的处理建议

variables.Y: 监测期间的超声检查事件

source_text: For well‑defined, autonomous nodules FNA is rarely indicated and repeat ultrasound may not be necessary. For other nodules not meeting criteria for FNA, or nodules that appear to be benign by ultrasound or FNA, surveillance should include repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months; if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals. If growth and/or change in ultrasonographic features, consider FNA and follow THYR‑3, THYR‑4, and THYR-5 for subsequent management.

rule_name: 监测中结节超声特征变化后的处理建议

variables.Y: 监测期间的超声检查事件

source_text: For well‑defined, autonomous nodules FNA is rarely indicated and repeat ultrasound may not be necessary. For other nodules not meeting criteria for FNA, or nodules that appear to be benign by ultrasound or FNA, surveillance should include repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months; if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals. If growth and/or change in ultrasonographic features, consider FNA and follow THYR‑3, THYR‑4, and THYR-5 for subsequent management.

rule_name: 分子检测提示乳头状癌_参考特定指南
source_text: j) The diagnosis of follicular carcinoma or Hürthle cell carcinoma requires evidence of either vascular or capsular invasion, which cannot be determined by FNA. Molecular diagnostics may be useful to allow reclassification of follicular lesions (ie, follicular neoplasm, atypia of undetermined significance [AUS], follicular lesions of undetermined significance [FLUS]) as either more or less likely to be benign or malignant based on the genetic profile. If molecular testing suggests papillary thyroid carcinoma, especially in the case of BRAF V600E, see (PAP‑1). If molecular testing, in conjunction with clinical and ultrasound features, predicts a risk of malignancy comparable to the risk of malignancy seen with a benign FNA cytology (approximately 5% or less), consider active surveillance. Molecular markers should be interpreted with caution and in the context of clinical, radiographic, and cytologic features of each individual patient.

rule_name: 分子诊断需在临床影像细胞学背景下谨慎解读

head.name: 解读要求
arguments: 需谨慎并在临床背景下

source_text: j) The diagnosis of follicular carcinoma or Hürthle cell carcinoma requires evidence of either vascular or capsular invasion, which cannot be determined by FNA. Molecular diagnostics may be useful to allow reclassification of follicular lesions (ie, follicular neoplasm, atypia of undetermined significance [AUS], follicular lesions of undetermined significance [FLUS]) as either more or less likely to be benign or malignant based on the genetic profile. rule_name: 甲状腺结节使用TI-RADS标准评估后的监测策略
source_text: THYR-2• Links to TI-RADS and ATA criteria for FNA were added.• "Active surveillance" changed to "Nodule surveillance" (also for THYR-3, THYR-4, and THYR-5)• Footnote f was updated: "Tg washout may be useful in diagnosis of lymph node metastases and is recommended if cytology is negative or non‑diagnostic. Consider at the time of lymph node biopsy."• Footnote h was updated: "For well‑defined, autonomous nodules FNA is rarely indicated and repeat ultrasound may not be necessary. For other nodules not meeting criteria for FNA, or nodules that appear to be benign by ultrasound or FNA, surveillance should include repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months; if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals. If growth and/or change in ultrasonographic features, consider FNA and follow THYR‑3, THYR‑4, and THYR-5 for subsequent management."

rule_name: 细胞学结果为滤泡性病变的甲状腺结节恶性风险评估
source_text: THYR‑3• Footnote k was updated: "Alternative terms include: rule out neoplasm, atypical follicular lesion, and cellular follicular lesion. Estimated risk of malignancy is 5%‑15% 6%–18%. Also for THYR-4.• Footnote m is new: "The order of the treatment options does not indicate preference."

rule_name: 诊断结果为分子诊断的甲状腺结节治疗选项调整
source_text: THYR‑4• The page name was changed to "Molecular Diagnostic Results" from "FNA Results."• Follicular neoplasm, bottom pathway treatment: "Consider lobectomy for definitive diagnosis/treatment" was removed.

rule_name: 实体甲状腺结节重复非诊断性FNA后的治疗考虑
source_text: THYR-5• Insufficient biopsy, nondiagnostic, solid treatment: "if repeat non‑diagnostic FNAs" added to "Consider surgery."

rule_name: 增长的良性甲状腺结节不建议多次活检
source_text: THYR-5• "Generally, more than two biopsies on a growing benign nodule are not indicated." was added to footnote t.

rule_name: 低TSH甲状腺结节_放射性碘扫描_自主功能性结节管理
source_text: For thyroid nodule known or suspected on exam or incidental imaging finding:• Measure thyroid‑stimulating hormone (TSH)• Ultrasound of thyroid and neck including lateral neck lymph node compartmentsThyroid nodule(s) with low TSHThyroid nodule(s) with normal or elevated TSHaa	Evaluate and treat for hypothyroidism as clinically indicated.b	For well‑defined, autonomous nodules FNA is rarely indicated and repeat ultrasound may not be necessary. For other nodules not meeting criteria for FNA, or nodules that appear to be benign by ultrasound or FNA, surveillance should include repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months; if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals. If growth, follow THYR‑2 for subsequent management.Radioiodineimaging 123l thyroid uptake and scanAutonomously functioning (hot)HypofunctionalEvaluate and treat for thyrotoxicosis as indicated(malignancy is rare)bConsider ultrasound‑guided FNA based on clinical and sonographic featuresSeeSonographicFeaturesb (THYR‑2)

rule_name: 符合特定细胞学特征的良性结节建议监测
source_text: Includes nodular goiter, colloid nodule, hyperplastic/adenomatoid nodule, and Hashimoto’s thyroiditis. Estimated risk of malignancy is approximately 5% or less; consider active surveillance.s	Repeat ultrasound after 6–12 months, if stable for 1–2 years, then subsequent ultrasound can be considered at 3‑ to 5‑year intervals.t	Growth defined as >50% increase in nodule volume or 20% increase in size of 2–3 dimensions. Size changes should be >2 mm and should be assessed by direct comparison of images. Generally, more than two biopsies on a growing benign nodule are not indicated.THYR‑5Diagnostic categories for FNA results reflect NCI state of the science conference, the Bethesda Classification. Cibas ES and Ali SZ. Thyroid 2017;

rule_name: 初始监测期后结节稳定则延长监测间隔

head.name: 临床管理建议
arguments: 延长超声监测间隔至3至5年
